subcodes.first_line: We informed the religious leaders of 'Atabat that We were prepared to accept their request to perform any miracle they chose
subcodes.first_line_orig: ما بحضرات علما در عتبات پیغام دادیم که اگر میخواهند مطلب ما را بفهمند
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @power of the Manifestation of God
